commentaries.author: Ambrosiaster
commentaries.content: Knowing that he has a lot to do in Corinth, Paul does not want to pass through on his way somewhere else but to spend time with them when he comes. Commentary on Paul’s Epistles.

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: Now these things he said, both to signify his love and also to terrify the sinners, not however openly, but with outward demonstration of friendship.
